title: Ossaea confertiflora
taxonomy: Ossaea confertiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This family is commonly known as the memecyclid or the melastome family. The Melastomataceae family consists of approximately 160 genera and over 5,000 species of flowering plants. These plants are mostly found in tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas, Africa, and Southeast Asia. Ossaea confertiflora, like other members of the Melastomataceae family, is a shrub or small tree that produces showy flowers.
